text:
Razorbait is a character appearing in Attack on Playtime, the seventh short story of Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Razorbait is a bald man who wears a balck suit with a white shirt and a red tie.

Story

Razorbait notices Hodge brought a Titan in the school and reprimands her. He calls the Titan hideous, which angers Hodge and she hits him. He grips his sword and faces the two girls but Petunia eventually eats him.
